mapper.select: SELECT o.orderDate, o.orderNO, o.memberId, j.joinNO, p.productName, j.productNO, j.orderProductOptions, j.orderQty, j.orderAmount, j.orderStatement, d.deliveryStatus, i.imageFilename, COALESCE(r.memberId, 'null') AS mi FROM orders o JOIN ordersJoin j ON o.joinNO = j.joinNO LEFT JOIN ( SELECT articleNO, imageFilename FROM ( SELECT imageNO, articleNO, imageFilename, imageType, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY articleNO ORDER BY imageNO ASC) AS rn FROM image ) t WHERE rn = 1 ) i ON j.productNO = i.articleNO JOIN product p ON j.productNO = p.productNO LEFT JOIN delivery d ON j.joinNO = d.joinNO AND j.productNO = d.productNO LEFT JOIN review r ON j.joinNO = r.orderNO AND j.productNO = r.productNO WHERE o.memberId = #{memberId} ORDER BY j.joinNO DESC

SELECT o.orderDate, o.orderNO, o.memberId, j.joinNO, p.productName, j.productNO, j.orderProductOptions, j.orderQty, j.orderAmount, j.orderStatement, d.deliveryStatus, i.imageFilename FROM orders o JOIN ordersJoin j ON o.joinNO = j.joinNO LEFT JOIN ( SELECT articleNO, imageFilename FROM ( SELECT imageNO, articleNO, imageFilename, imageType, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY articleNO ORDER BY imageNO ASC) AS rn FROM image ) t WHERE rn = 1 ) i ON j.productNO = i.articleNO JOIN product p ON j.productNO = p.productNO LEFT JOIN delivery d ON j.joinNO = d.joinNO AND j.productNO = d.productNO WHERE o.memberId = #{memberId} AND o.orderNO = #{orderNO} AND j.productNO = #{productNO} ORDER BY j.joinNO
